session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8799 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the pr-feedback-classifier skill and execute it with the given PR number.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the skill by fetching PR feedback for PR 8799 and classifying it.

tool_use.param: Check for file restructuring between main and HEAD

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-05 17:37:19 PT

Found 13 violations across 5 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ INACCURATE claims — None found
✅ DUPLICATIVE sections — None found
✅ DRIFT RISK sections — None found (minor drift risk in line-number references noted but not flagged as inline comments)
❌ VERBATIM code blocks — Found in 5 files

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:26`: Detection code block reproduces dispatch_cmd.py:224 call
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:40`: Pattern code block reproduces dispatch_cmd.py:224-230 / incremental_dispatch.py:108-114
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md:53`: Working Tree Sync code block reproduces dispatch_cmd.py:254-258 / incremental_dispatch.py:138-142
- `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md:24`: Import statement reproduces cli.py:22
- `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md:46`: top_level_commands list reproduces help_formatter.py:255
- `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md:49`: _SPARKLINE_RICH_STYLES dict + _rich_sparkline() reproduces list_cmd.py:94-106
- `docs/learned/textual/quirks.md:229`: StatusBar.__init__ code block reproduces status_bar.py:42
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md:21`: Field initialization reproduces app.py source
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md:33`: action_toggle_all_users reproduces filter_actions.py source
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md:43`: set_author_filter reproduces status_bar.py source
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md:49`: Binding definition reproduces app.py source
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md:55`: Help label reproduces help_screen.py source
- `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md:63`: Data provider filter logic reproduces app.py source

### Verdicts
| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md` | SIMPLIFY | 45% | 55% | 3 verbatim |
| `docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md` | SIMPLIFY | 35% | 65% | 2 verbatim |
| `docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md` | SIMPLIFY | 30% | 70% | 1 verbatim |
| `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md` | KEEP | 5% | 95% | 0 (new section is HIGH VALUE) |
| `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` | KEEP | 5% | 95% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/refactoring/coordinated-rename.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/textual/quirks.md` | SIMPLIFY | 15% | 85% | 1 verbatim |
| `docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md` | REPLACE WITH CODE REFS | 65% | 35% | 6 verbatim |

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md`: 3 violations

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C origin/master...HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat -M -C master...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "No divergence from master"

**Analysis:**
The PR has: - **Review threads**: None (empty array) - **Discussion comments**: 4 total comments - 2 are bot-generated workflow status comments (CI-related) - 1 is a human comment about plan queueing (metadata) - 1 is an audit report with violations (bot-generated, actionable)
The file restructuring shows this PR adds new documentation files across multiple categories (architecture, cli, planning, refactoring, textual, tui), with modifications to index and tripwire files.
The bot audit comment identifies 13 violations (verbatim code blocks) that need addressing. This is actionable feedback.
